`{r} sR$headerList$createdAt`:

:   `{r} dR$creationTimestamp`

`{r} sR$headerList$dataUpTo`:

:   `{r} dR$dataUpToTimestamp`

`{r} sR$headerList$analysisPeriod`:

:   `{r} dR$analysisPeriod`

`{r} if(length(reference_data$metadata$countries) > 1){sR$headerList$countries}else{sR$headerList$country}`:

:   `{r} dR$countriesList`

`{r} sR$headerList$birthweightFilter`:

:   `{r} dR$birthweightFilter`

`{r} sR$headerList$gestationalAgeFilter`:

:   `{r} dR$gestationalAgeFilter`

```{r Countries hint}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

if(length(reference_data$metadata$countries) > 1){
  cat(sep = "\n", c(
    "::: {.callout-note}",
    paste0("## ", sR$headerList$multiCountryHintHeader),
    "",
    sR$headerList$multiCountryHint,
    "",
    sR$headerList$multiCountryHintGoal,
    ":::"))
} else {
  cat(sep = "\n", c(
    "::: {.callout-note}",
    paste0("## ", sR$headerList$singleCountryHintHeader),
    "",
    sR$headerList$singleCountryHint,
    "",
    sR$headerList$singleCountryRepresentativenessHint,
    ":::"))
}
```

```{r Custom report hint}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

if(
  reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$include_test_data ||
  reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$include_ineligible_patients) {
  cat(sep = "\n", c("::: {.callout-note}", paste0(
    c(
    sR$headerList$specialAnalysisHint,
    if(!testUnitFilter){
      paste0(sR$headerList$includesTestDepartments,
      if(!defaultPatientFilter)
        sR$headerList$and
      else
        ".", collapse = "")
    },
    if (!defaultPatientFilter)
      sR$headerList$ignoresInclusionCriteria
    ), collapse = " "),
    ":::"))
}
```
